rules.rule: every page continuity manifest MUST cite composition_id and the ordered page_index sequence.
page numbering MUST be contiguous starting from 1; gaps BLOCK publication.
continuation_of links MUST form an acyclic chain; cycles BLOCK publication.
every section_id referenced by the composition MUST appear on at least one page; orphan sections BLOCK publication.
every block citing an asset_id MUST resolve against an existing layer-43 asset record; orphan visuals BLOCK composition approval.
missing section lineage (section_id without grounding/synthesis chain) BLOCKS publication-ready.
